subcodes.first_line: Thy letter reached the Wronged One and was heard in its entirety. Praise be to God, the fragrance of divine love was wafted therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات نزد مظلوم حاضر و تمام آن اصغا شد لله الحمد عرف محبت الهی از آن متضوع
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for teaching, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
